entity.name: Gianson
entity.description: Independent researcher building open simulation infrastructure for multi-agent systems on GPU clusters.

projects.name: dualmirakl
projects.description: Dual/tri-GPU multi-agent simulation framework. Orchestrates LLM-powered agents across GPU slots with FLAME population dynamics, Bayesian calibration (ABC-SMC), sensitivity analysis (Morris/Sobol), chaos metrics (Lyapunov, transfer entropy), and graph-based agent memory. Domain-agnostic: swap a YAML scenario file to simulate any multi-agent system.

channels.description: One-time or recurring support via Stripe

plans.name: Community Supporter
plans.description: Help keep dualmirakl open, maintained, and GPU-tested. Funds go toward RunPod compute for CI, model hosting, and development time.
